name: Explainable AI for Healthcare
desc: Experience the future of healthcare with our Explainable AI System that predicts and explains risks for Heart Disease ,Diabetes and General Disease—combining accuracy with transparency.

name: handwritten digit recognition
desc: his project develops a handwritten digit recognition system using the MNIST dataset. A neural network model is trained to accurately classify digits from 0 to 9.

name: AI virtual assistant
desc: An AI virtual assistant built with Python that uses NLP to automate tasks, answer queries, and enhance user productivity.

name: Face emotion recognition
desc: Face emotion recognition in Python uses machine learning and computer vision to analyze facial expressions and classify emotions like happiness, sadness, anger, and surprise.

name: Face Mask Detection System
desc: Face Mask Detection system using Machine Learning and Arduino Nano that detects mask compliance and triggers visual and buzzer alerts for safety enforcement.

name: Swasthyasathi
desc: Swasthyasathi is a digital healthcare initiative that improves medical accessibility through telemedicine, data analytics, and machine learning–based personalized care solutions.

name: Iris Flowers Classification
desc: Iris Flowers Classification is a machine learning project that classifies iris flower species based on sepal and petal measurements using algorithms like Decision Trees, SVM, and KNN.

name: Card Fraud Detection
desc: Card Fraud Detection is a machine learning project that identifies fraudulent credit card transactions using historical data and algorithms like Random Forest and Logistic Regression.

name: Titanic Survival Prediction
desc: Titanic Survival Prediction is a machine learning project that predicts passenger survival on the Titanic using features like age, gender, class, and fare.
